lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee baanee jis man vasai |
lines.english: Those, whose minds are filled with the Word of the Guru's Bani,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਦ ਅਟਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad sadaa sad attalaa |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad is unchanging, forever and ever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਮ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: har rang raataa man raam gun gaavai |
lines.english: Imbued with the Lord's Love, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.
They are liberated, bathing in the dust of the feet of the Holy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਦਰਦੁ ਸਭੁ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਨਸੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dookh darad sabh taa kaa nasai |1|
lines.english: All pains and afflictions run away from them. ||1||
By Guru's Grace, they are carried across to the other shore;
they are rid of fear, doubt and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਤਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਸੇ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: man tan antar base gur charanaa |
lines.english: The Guru's Feet abide deep within their minds and bodies.
The Holy are fearless; they take to the Sanctuary of the Lord. ||2||
The Perfect Guru makes them His Own, and protects them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਤ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਸਭਿ ਲਾਥੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har naam japat kilabikh sabh laathe |3|
lines.english: Chanting the Lord's Name, they are rid of all their sins. ||3||
They are blessed with abundant bliss, happiness, pleasure and peace.
Enemies and pains do not even approach them.
The painful noose of death and rebirth is snapped.
The Saints, spiritual companions and Sikhs are exalted and uplifted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਿਉ ਲੈ ਮੇਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur poorai prabh siau lai mele |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru leads them to meet God.
The Perfect True Guru has bestowed the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Says Nanak, the Guru covers their faults. ||4||8||
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਮੰਗਲ ਕਲਿਆਣ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਸਗਲਾ ਰਾਸਿ ਥੀਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anad mangal kaliaan sadaa sukh kaaraj sagalaa raas theea |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am blessed with bliss and happiness, emancipation and eternal peace. All my affairs have been resolved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਉਠਿ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: nit utth gaavahu prabh kee baanee |
lines.english: Rise early, and sing the Glorious Word of God's Bani.
I am rid of pain, suffering, doubt and fraud. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਮਨਿ ਵੂਠੇ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal gur ke man vootthe |
lines.english: The Lotus Feet of the Guru abide within my mind.
Twenty-four hours a day, meditate in remembrance on the Lord, O mortal. ||2||
Inwardly and outwardly, God is everywhere.
Wherever I go, He is always with me, my Helper and Support. ||3||
O Nanak, I meditate forever on the Lord, the Treasure of Virtue. ||4||9||
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:
With my palms pressed together, I offer this prayer.
The Supreme Lord God is All-wise and All-knowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਦਰਸਨ ਕਉ ਜਾਈਐ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa paaeeai vaddabhaagee darasan kau jaaeeai kurabaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Perfect Guru is found by great good fortune. I am a sacrifice to the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. ||1||Pause||
I have become worthy of worshipping the Naam in adoration.
My sins are cut away, through the Word of the Shabad, and I have found contentment.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I have been enlightened.
The Lord's Lotus Feet abide within my mind. ||1||
The One who made us, protects and preserves us.
God is Perfect, the Master of the masterless.
Those, upon whom He showers His Mercy
- they have perfect karma and conduct. ||2||
They do not wander in the 8.4 million incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਨਵੇ ॥
lines.translit: gun gaavai nit nit nit nave |
lines.english: They sing the Glories of God, continually, continuously, forever fresh and new.
Their faces are radiant, and they are honored in the Court of the Lord. ||3||
That person, upon whose forehead the Guru places His Hand
Here and hereafter, they worship the Lord's Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਧਰਸਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ॥੪॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak udharas tis jan kee dhoor |4|10|
lines.english: Nanak is saved by the dust of the feet of such a humble being. ||4||10||
He sees God pervading and permeating the water, the land and the sky.
out of millions, how rare is that slave.
Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੁ ਜਪਨੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis prasaad har har jap japane |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By His Grace, I chant and meditate on the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||Pause||
I am a sacrifice to my Perfect Guru.
Listening to the Ambrosial Word of His Bani, I am exalted and enraptured.
My corrupt and poisonous entanglements are gone. ||1||
Chanting the Naam, I am enlightened.
I am in love with the True Word of His Shabad.
The Lord God has come into my consciousness. ||2||
